content:
data enrichment strategy for ucc-mca intelligence platform


Executive Summary



Based on my review of your repo, I'll design a tiered data enrichment architecture using MCPs (Model Context Protocols) and public records APIs. Your platform currently uses mock data in src/lib/mockData.ts — we'll replace this with real data pipelines that scale from free to premium tiers.

Current State Analysis



Your TypeScript/React application has:
  • Frontend-only architecture (Vite + React 19)
  • Mock data generators for prospects, UCC filings, health scores, and growth signals
  • Agentic AI system for intelligence analysis
  • Export capabilities (JSON/CSV)
  • No backend data pipeline yet

Tiered Data Architecture
